_comment: Canonical Claude plugin manifest template. Rendered by Publish-Agents.ps1 (Job 3) into agents/{AGENT_NAME}/.claude-plugin/plugin.json. Placeholders: integration, 1.0.0, Merged event-driven + batch + data-migration: Azure Functions, Logic Apps, Service Bus, APIM, Event Grid, ADF, SFTP, SQL staging, bulk Dataverse, merged. See ADR-0004 for the plugin-distribution rationale.
